sidebar.container: fixed left-0 top-0 h-full w-64 z-40 bg-[#f1f3ff] dark:bg-[#1a2133] flex flex-col py-8 px-4 gap-y-2 font-['Inter'] text-[0.875rem] tracking-normal
sidebar.logoIcon: w-10 h-10 bg-primary-container rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center text-white
sidebar.activeLink: relative flex items-center px-4 py-3 text-[#0052FF] font-semibold before:content-[''] before:absolute before:left-0 before:w-1 before:h-6 before:bg-[#0052FF] before:rounded-r-full transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out
sidebar.inactiveLink: flex items-center px-4 py-3 text-[#565e71] dark:text-[#9ea4b3] hover:text-[#0052FF] hover:bg-white/50 dark:hover:bg-white/5 transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out rounded-lg
sidebar.primaryButton: w-full mb-4 bg-gradient-to-br from-primary to-primary-container text-white py-3 px-4 rounded-xl font-semibold flex items-center justify-center gap-2 shadow-lg shadow-primary/20 active:scale-95 transition-transform

topbar.container: fixed top-0 right-0 left-64 z-50 glass-header flex justify-between items-center px-8 py-4 border-b border-transparent shadow-[0_12px_40px_rgba(20,27,43,0.06)]
topbar.searchInput: w-full bg-surface-container-low border-none rounded-full py-2 pl-10 pr-4 text-sm focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 transition-all
topbar.iconButton: p-2 text-secondary hover:bg-[#f1f3ff] rounded-full transition-colors active:scale-95
topbar.primaryButton: ml-2 px-6 py-2 bg-primary-container text-white rounded-full text-sm font-semibold hover:opacity-90 active:scale-95 transition-all
topbar.avatar: w-10 h-10 rounded-full border-2 border-white shadow-sm

main.container: ml-64 min-h-screen pt-24 px-8 pb-12 bg-surface text-on-surface

card.container: bg-surface-container-lowest rounded-xl p-8 shadow-[0_12px_40px_rgba(20,27,43,0.06)] relative overflow-hidden
